rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Motion For Order Allowing Defendants Attorney And Expert To Inspect Receivership Properties With Manager And For Order Instructing Receiver To Comply With Ccp 568 2
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 6, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT ANNE KIHAGI, JULIA MWANGI, CHRISTINE MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC Defendants Motion For Order Allowing Defendants Attorney And Expert To Inspect Receivership Properties With Manager And For Order Instructing Receiver To Comply With Ccp 568 2 Hearing Required. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. BELLROSE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 6, 2020 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW CHIU DEMURRER to 4TH Amended CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to October 22, 2020. The Court received courtesy copies of the papers in support of and in opposition to the motion. No courtesy copy of the operative cross-complaint, as required by SFLR 2.7B was provided. Moving parties shall meet and confer and provide one copy of the operative complaint no later than October 9, 2020 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN EDMONDS VS. 1310 MINNESOTA STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant William Chen Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 6, 2020 line 4. Defendant William Chen Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. Cross-Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Cross-Complaint shall not include any DOE/ROE allegations (See Reply 2:14-24). =(501/CFH)
